tasks.rationale: Python scientific stack task with stable CLI/runtime; suitable for deterministic augmented command checks plus a baseline regression command.
Parser/IO-adjacent task where additional commands are reviewer-readable and reproducible in workspace-local execution.
Framework task with deterministic command surface; suitable for explicit augmented failure probes and regression sanity checks.
Application-level behavior task where command-level strengthening remains local, reproducible, and attributable by family.
Patch-local Django task with clear command-based strengthening hooks and deterministic repro artifacts.
